DuckDB Extensions Analysis

Purpose
- Analyse DuckDB’s extension ecosystem (core + community).
- Generate daily reports (Markdown, CSV, Excel, HTML) and optional GitHub issues health signals.

Key links
- Docs: https://mjboothaus.github.io/duckdb-extensions-analysis/docs/
- Latest report (Markdown): https://mjboothaus.github.io/duckdb-extensions-analysis/report.md
- Report UI (HTML): https://mjboothaus.github.io/duckdb-extensions-analysis/
- Compatibility testing report (HTML): https://mjboothaus.github.io/duckdb-extensions-analysis/compatibility/

Common local commands (via just)
- just install
- just workflow
- just workflow-fresh
- just report
- just report-all
- just site
- just check
- uv run pytest

Repository
- https://github.com/Mjboothaus/duckdb-extensions-analysis
